targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by (le, protocol, signal, encoding) (rate(icegate_ingest_otlp_request_size_bytes_bucket{job="ingest"}[1m])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, protocol, signal, encoding) (rate(icegate_ingest_otlp_request_size_bytes_bucket{job="ingest"}[1m])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, protocol, signal, encoding) (rate(icegate_ingest_otlp_request_size_bytes_bucket{job="ingest"}[1m])))
histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by (le, protocol, signal, status) (rate(icegate_ingest_otlp_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job="ingest"}[1m])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, protocol, signal, status) (rate(icegate_ingest_otlp_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job="ingest"}[1m])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, protocol, signal, status) (rate(icegate_ingest_otlp_request_duration_seconds_bucket{job="ingest"}[1m])))

panels.description: OTLP transform duration before WAL preparation.
panels.title: Request: transform latency [1m]

panels.description: OTLP WAL sorting duration before enqueue.
panels.title: Request: WAL sorting latency [1m]

panels.description: Number of records in the accumulator
panels.title: WAL: pending records to flush

panels.description: Number of batches in the accumulator
panels.title: WAL: pending batches to flush

panels.description: Absolute runtime busy load in worker-equivalents (sum of worker busy seconds per second over 1m). Not normalized by worker count: 1.0 means one fully busy worker, 2.5 means ~2.5 workers busy.
panels.title: Worker load [1m]

panels.description: Normalized worker utilization in percent (0..100) per instance. Computed as average per-worker busy ratio over 1m with per-worker clamp to 100%.
panels.title: Worker utilization [%] [1m]

panels.description: Number of segments waiting to be processed
panels.title: WAL: segments backlog [1m]

targets.expr:
sum by (topic, status) (rate(icegate_ingest_shift_queue_read_segment_duration_seconds_sum{job="ingest"}[1m]))
/
sum by (topic, status) (rate(icegate_ingest_shift_queue_read_segment_duration_seconds_count{job="ingest"}[1m]))

panels.title: Plan task: get last offset duration [1m]
Plan task: latency of segment planing and reading

panels.description: It shows the intensity of planning shift tasks
panels.title: Plan task: planning shift tasks [1m]
Plan task: planned segments per shift task [1m]

panels.description: Includes: parquet file creation (sort, compress), writing and retries
panels.title: ⚠️ Shift task: parquet write latency [1m]
Shift task: Record batches per task [1m]
Shift task: planned input bytes per task [1m]
Commit task: get parquet files latency [1m]

targets.expr:
(
  sum by (topic, task) (rate(icegate_ingest_shift_task_success_total{job="ingest"}[1m]))
)
/
clamp_min(
  (
    sum by (topic, task) (rate(icegate_ingest_shift_task_success_total{job="ingest"}[1m]))
  ) +
  (
    sum by (topic, task) (rate(icegate_ingest_shift_task_failures_total{job="ingest"}[1m]))
    or
    sum by (topic, task) (rate(icegate_ingest_shift_task_success_total{job="ingest"}[1m])) * 0
  ),
  1e-12
)

panels.description: Lifetime of one row group while it stays open in row groups merger
panels.title: Shift task: row groups merger row group lifetime [1m]
Shift task: row groups merger open state

targets.expr:
(
  sum by (method) (rate(icegate_jobmanager_storage_cache_hits_ratio_total{job="ingest"}[1m]))
)
/
clamp_min(
  (
    sum by (method) (rate(icegate_jobmanager_storage_cache_hits_ratio_total{job="ingest"}[1m])) +
    sum by (method) (rate(icegate_jobmanager_storage_cache_misses_ratio_total{job="ingest"}[1m]))
  ),
  1e-12
)
histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by (le, protocol, signal, status) (rate(icegate_ingest_otlp_decode_duration_seconds_bucket{job="ingest"}[1m])))
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, protocol, signal, status) (rate(icegate_ingest_otlp_decode_duration_seconds_bucket{job="ingest"}[1m])))
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, protocol, signal, status) (rate(icegate_ingest_otlp_decode_duration_seconds_bucket{job="ingest"}[1m])))
